description: CompositionLight green and yellow checked pleated tunic top with light blue accents, made of 100% cotton, has mega sleeves which can be rolled up and fastened with buttoned flaps, modified mandarin collar with tape detailing on the inseam, buttoned placket on the front extending till the waist, pin tuck detailing on the upper bust area, insert pockets on the sides and has a curved hemlineFittingRegularWash careMachine wash warm using a mild detergentWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleach or wring Tumble dry or flat dry in shadeWarm ironDo not iron on print/embellishment/embroideryUpgrade your feminine casual style with this checked green and yellow shirt from lee. The pin tucks on the upper bust adds an element of interest, while the tunic desing accentuates your figure. Team this with leggings and lifestyle footwear from the wide collection available at myntra for casual occasions.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in tunic topsHeight-6.3”, Shoulders-19"
